text.title: Growth Experiment Design Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the one-page experiment doc. Subagent must produce all fields before the experiment ships.

field.name: hypothesis
field.format: If we [change], for [segment], then [metric] will [direction] by [W%] within [window].

field.name: ice_score
field.constraint: impact between 1 and 10; confidence between 1 and 10; ease between 1 and 10

forbidden.pattern: Hypothesis missing any of: change, segment, metric, magnitude, window (violates r1)
ice_score average < 5 without explicit override note (violates r2)
instrumentation_playback_status != pass at launch time (violates r4)
sample_size_plan with power_target < 0.8 OR required_sample_per_arm not justified (violates r5)
primary_metric.baseline_variance absent (sample math cannot be verified)
writeup_template_committed == false at launch (post-hoc framing risk)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Adjust traffic_split to 90/10 for risky-treatment experiments; document the choice in control_definition.exclusion_rules.
Extend planned_run_days if SRM check fails on day 1 and the cause is identified; do NOT shorten run mid-experiment to declare a win.
Add guardrail_metrics during pre-flight; never remove guardrails once experiment has launched.

list.item: Control defined before rollout, timestamp recorded
Sample size plan ties to MDE and power ≥ 0.8
Pre-flight reviewer is named and ≠ owner
